description: Create an enabled CMS Page titled 'New Arrivals Showcase' with the URL Key 'new-arrivals-showcase'. The page content must include an h1 heading 'Fresh Finds for the Season', the paragraph 'Explore our latest additions to the collection.', and a 'Catalog New Products List' widget configured to display 6 products using the New Products Grid Template. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
